- **Server Actions** (`src/actions/health-follow-up.ts`)
- `getHealthFollowUps(examRecordId?)` — 사후조치 이력 조회
- `createHealthFollowUp(data)` — 등록 (tenantId 격리, audit log)
- `completeHealthFollowUp(id)` — 조치 완료 확인
- `updateHealthFollowUp(id, data)` — 수정
- `deleteHealthFollowUp(id)` — soft delete
- `getFollowUpDashboard()` — 미이행/완료/전체 KPI
